title: Wälsungenblut
writer: Ennio Flaiano, Erika Mann, Thomas Mann
actors: Michael Maien, Elena Nathanail, Gerd Baltus
plot: Lieutenant Beckerath is invited by Captain Kunz von Arnstatt to tea with his family. There, Count Sibling Siegmund and Sieglinde provoke him, but that does not stop him from holding Sieglinde's hand.
